series_metadata.series_description: This record retention schedule consists of the results obtained from criminal background check conducted by BCI and other law enforcement agencies for applicants for certificates of finder registration.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: background checks that produce no criminal records applicant, paper copy approval of application and issuance of a finder registration applicant. background checks that produce criminal records applicant, paper copy application is denied and expiration of time of all potential applicant''s appeals has passed
